# System: "Your table at Darrys Cookhouse and Wine Shop has been successfully booked for 8 people at 14:15 on Sunday. Regarding your question about ship hull construction materials, commonly used materials include steel, aluminum, fiberglass, and wood. Steel is most widely used for its strength and durability, aluminum is chosen for its light weight and corrosion resistance, fiberglass is popular for smaller vessels due to its ease of molding, and wood is traditionally used for its availability and workability in certain types of boats. If you have any more questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!"
